description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a prominent dark hip roof and a light-colored exterior. The house features a covered front porch supported by columns, with a small set of steps leading up to the main entryway. Surrounding the house are landscaped elements, including several trees and shrubs, as well as paved walkways and a driveway. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with multiple rectangular panes visible on the front and sides. The property includes adjacent structures such as a detached garage and a paved area, suggesting a suburban or neighborhood setting. The overall design is clean and orderly, with a focus on functional outdoor space and curb appeal.
description: A single-story house with a dark hip roof, light exterior, covered porch, and symmetrical windows, surrounded by landscaping and paved areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with porch, steps, and landscaping, as well as the driveway and adjacent trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hip roof, detached garage, and a row of trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, additional paved area, and a line of trees behind the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's side elevation, garage, and driveway extending to the street.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, steps, and a central door
